2026-04-05.original_content: DeepTutor v1.0 Official Release — Brand New Agent-Native Intelligent Learning Platform! Fully Open-Sourced: https://github.com/HKUDS/DeepTutor Three months since our initial release, we've been continuously iterating and have completely rebuilt DeepTutor into a powerful Agent-Native intelligent learning platform. What's New for DeepTutor v1.0: - 🏗️ New Dual-Layer Architecture: Tools + Capabilities Bottom layer has 7 tools (knowledge base retrieval, web search, code execution, deep reasoning, brainstorming, paper search, GeoGebra visualization). Top layer has 5 capability modules, each being a multi-step agent pipeline: 💬 Chat — Tool-enhanced intelligent conversation 🧮 Deep Solve — Planning → Reasoning → Writing, multi-stage problem solving ❓ Deep Question — Automatic question generation with follow-up mode 📚 Deep Research — Multi-agent collaborative deep research & report generation 🎬 Math Animator — Input math concepts, auto-generate Manim visualization videos - 🖥️ Three Usage Methods, One Runtime CLI, WebSocket API, Python SDK—whether you're an end user, frontend developer, or doing secondary development, there's a corresponding integration method. - 🤖 TutorBot: Bring AI Teachers into Your Chat Apps Supports integration with 12 platforms including Telegram, Discord, Slack, WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, WhatsApp. Configure and use—turn DeepTutor into your group's AI teaching assistant. - 🌐 Brand New Web Interface Redesigned frontend with new Playground (one-stop deep capability experience), Co-Writer (AI collaborative writing), Agents (TutorBot management & conversation) pages, plus major improvements to the Guide learning page. - 🔧 Complete Infrastructure Overhaul Multi-LLM provider support, multiple embedding adapters, 10 search engines, SQLite session persistence... laying the foundation for stability and scalability. #DeepTutor #HKUDS
2026-04-05.chinese_title: 香港大学开源DeepTutor v1.0：全新Agent-Native智能学习平台
2026-04-05.summary: 香港大学数据科学研究院推出开源智能学习平台DeepTutor v1.0，采用双层架构设计，底层集成7大工具能力，上层构建5个多步Agent模块，支持对话、解题、问答、研究和动画生成等功能。
2026-04-05.extension: 教育AI工具赛道竞争激烈，DeepTutor的开源策略可能吸引开发者社区关注，影响现有教育科技产品的市场格局，值得追踪其GitHub星标增长和实际应用案例。
